title: Factors to Note Ahead of BlackBerry's Q3 Earnings Release
text: Analysts on average expected BlackBerry to post a loss of $0.07 per share in Q3 2022, compared to EPS of $0.02 in Q3 2021. The estimated revenue was $176.58 million, representing a decrease of nearly 27% from the prior-year quarter. BlackBerry had beaten earnings estimates in the past eight quarters and upcoming earnings might beat estimates. During the quarter, BlackBerry partnered with Deloitte to help OEMs and those building mission-critical applications secure their software supply chains, and improved the integration of BlackBerry Unified Endpoint Manager and Microsoft 365. BB received a Moderate Sell rating among Wall Street analysts based on one Hold and three Sells.
